response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements made during the game's redevelopment. Although we have significantly increased the frame rate through optimization techniques, the integration of new hardware-intensive features, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces performance considerations. We aim to maintain a balance between these advancements and system efficiency.  

Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the updated game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can accommodate in their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can hold up to 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release varying amounts of fluid during climax: a Dreamer typically expels 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing may inject 400-600ml into their partner.  

Picture #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-programmed in sexual scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy levels, and stamina. Certain character abilities, obtained through experimentation with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  

Picture #4 and #5 depict interactive body dynamics and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  

Pictures #6, #7, and #8 preview upcoming bondage equipment and cooperative sexual scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
